item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-matching-process-001 title: validate matching process between two users module: matching source pages: 7 preconditions: two users are registered and have profiles. test data: user 1: profile1, user 2: profile2 test steps: 1. user 2 swipes right on user 1's profile. 2. verify the server saves the preference in the database. 3. user 1 swipes right on user 2's profile. 4. verify the server saves the preference in the database. 5. verify the server checks for a match. 6. verify the server notifies user 1 of a match and opens the chat. 7. verify the application displays the match screen for both users. expected result: both users should be notified of a match and see the match screen.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-api-007 title: validate api interaction with push notifications system module: api source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: test steps: 1. send a request to the api to send a push notification. 2. verify the push notification is delivered to the intended user. expected result: the push notification should be successfully delivered.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-api-005 title: validate api interaction with jobs component module: api source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: test steps: 1. send a request to the api to trigger a background job. 2. verify the job is processed by the jobs component. expected result: the background job should be successfully processed.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-reg-003 title: validate user registration with duplicate email module: user registration source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: username: testuser, email: test@example.com, password: testpass test steps: 1. register a user with the same email. 2. attempt to register another user with the same email. 3. verify the server rejects the second registration due to duplicate email. expected result: the server should reject the second registration due to a duplicate email.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-reg-002 title: validate user registration with invalid email module: user registration source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: username: testuser, email: invalidemail, password: testpass test steps: 1. provide user details in the application. 2. submit the registration form. 3. verify the server rejects the registration due to invalid email. expected result: the server should reject the registration due to an invalid email.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-reg-001 title: validate user registration process module: user registration source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: username: testuser, email: test@example.com, password: testpass test steps: 1. provide user details in the application. 2. submit the registration form. 3. verify the server saves the user data. 4. verify the server generates and sends an otp. 5. enter the received otp. 6. verify the server confirms the otp and returns an authentication token. expected result: the user should be registered successfully, and an authentication token should be returned.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-jobs-001 title: verify job creation and execution module: jobs source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: test steps: 1. create a new job instance. 2. run the job. 3. verify the job status changes to completed. expected result: the job should complete successfully.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-login-001 title: validate user login process module: user login source pages: 4,5 preconditions: user is registered and has a valid email and password. test data: username: testuser, email: test@example.com, password: testpass test steps: 1. provide user credentials in the application. 2. submit the login form. 3. verify the server validates the email and password. 4. verify the server generates and sends an authentication token. 5. verify the application saves the token. 6. verify the application opens the home screen. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully, and the home screen should be opened.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-jobs-002 title: validate job batch management module: jobs source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: test steps: 1. create a job batch. 2. add jobs to the batch. 3. execute the batch. 4. verify all jobs in the batch are completed. expected result: all jobs in the batch should complete successfully.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-card-loading-001 title: validate initial card loading module: card loading source pages: 6 preconditions: application is initialized. test data: preload count: 10 test steps: 1. open the homepage. 2. verify the application requests 10 cards from the server. 3. verify the server requests 10 cards from the database. 4. verify the server returns 10 cards to the application. 5. verify the application displays the 10 cards. expected result: the application should display 10 cards.

item_text: api -> pages — type=communication; label="connessione tramite api"; explanation="communication between api and pages"
matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-card-loading-002 title: validate card loading with swipe module: card loading source pages: 6 preconditions: application is displaying initial cards. test data: swipe count: 5 test steps: 1. swipe 5 cards. 2. verify the application requests 5 more cards with an offset. 3. verify the server requests 5 cards with an offset from the database. 4. verify the server returns 5 cards to the application. 5. verify the application displays the additional 5 cards. expected result: the application should display 5 additional cards.
